name: AROMER Seed Pack v0.1
author: Stian Skogbrott
description: Pre-seeded priors, lessons and invariants for AROMER cold-start acceleration. REMORA remains the authoritative policy layer — AROMER adjusts trust/threshold/oracle selection only, never the policy core.
principle: Preseed != truth. Preseed = hypothesis with source, weight, confidence and decay.
a_b_recommendation: Run preseeded AROMER in shadow mode for >=50 episodes. Compare against cold-start AROMER on same episode replay set before committing.

files.description: JSON Schema for all seed entries
5 safety invariants — permanent, non-overridable by AROMER
14 tool-risk classifications across database, shell, git, network, webhook, medical, legal, energy domains
17 Bayesian domain harm priors (p_harm_prior + n_pseudo_observations) for DomainHarmPrior world model
5 lessons derived from AgentHarm benchmark — adversarial patterns that fooled heuristic baselines
10 documented REMORA/AROMER failure patterns with correct verdicts and annotations
6 epistemic rules for uncertainty handling, calibration and honest claim-making
5 adaptive strategy patterns: phase-adaptive thresholds, oracle diversity, bandit selection, latency budget routing, shadow-first adaptation
9 telecom and network operations domain lessons: BGP, SIP, cell tower, number portability, 5G core, spectrum, interconnect, E911, OSS/BSS
9 Cloudflare and GitHub operations lessons: Worker deployment, D1 migrations, WAF, API tokens, R2 buckets, git force push, branch delete, secret commits, repo visibility
12 golden episodes (JSONL) with correct verdicts and ground truth labels for EpisodicStore warm-start
Loader script — injects seeds into DomainHarmPrior and EpisodicStore. Supports --dry-run, --shadow, --out.

design_constraints.shadow_mode_first: All world-model adaptations >= 20% trust change require shadow validation (>=50 episodes before commit)
